purpose: Productized USP catalog for AX to D365FO migration positioning, delivery differentiation, and AI/KI feature traceability.

usps.name: Autonomous Migration PMO
usps.claim: The plugin generates project control, RAID, RACI, gates, evidence, escalations, and next actions from migration inputs.

usps.name: Evidence-Based Project Governance
usps.claim: A green status requires evidence, owner, gate context, and generated artifacts.

usps.name: AI Status Honesty Engine
usps.claim: Reported progress is challenged against real artifacts, missing gates, and evidence gaps.

usps.name: Go-Live Confidence Score
usps.claim: Go-live readiness is scored from testing, cutover, security, finance, commerce, data, and rollback signals.

usps.name: Migration Command Center in a Box
usps.claim: Local CLI, dashboards, reports, skills, docs, demo projects, and health snapshots run without cloud dependency.

usps.name: AX-to-D365FO Knowledge Pack
usps.claim: Curated migration knowledge covers AX 4.0, AX 2009, AX 2012, D365FO, Commerce, CRM, POS, governance, and intelligence.

usps.name: Role-Aware AI Delivery
usps.claim: Each role receives its own view, actions, gates, and evidence expectations.

usps.name: Solo Consultant Superpower
usps.claim: One plugin user can operate like a migration team by generating workstreams, gates, test plans, sign-offs, and daily actions.

usps.name: Commerce/POS Go-Live Guard
usps.claim: CSU, POS Offline, Payments, PCI, Store Smoke, and Channel Sync are treated as hard go-live gates.

usps.name: AI Migration Factory Generator
usps.claim: Workstreams, templates, packs, checklists, tests, cutover plans, and hypercare actions are generated from the same evidence base.

usps.name: Audit-Ready by Default
usps.claim: Evidence vault, hashes, sign-off binder, and gate results are generated as standard project artifacts.

usps.name: Board-Ready Migration Story
usps.claim: Technical analysis is translated into decision-ready executive narrative, risk forecast, and value framing.

usps.name: Legacy Simplification Engine
usps.claim: The plugin identifies customizations, reports, and integrations that should be retired, standardized, configured, or replaced.

usps.name: D365 Standard Fit Advisor
usps.claim: D365 standard capability, configuration, and process change are preferred before rebuild decisions.

usps.name: Migration Risk Radar
usps.claim: Risks are role-aware, evidence-based, and cutover-relevant rather than static list items.

usps.name: AI Workstream Orchestrator
usps.claim: Finance, SCM, CRM, Commerce, POS, Data, Integration, Security, Testing, and Governance workstreams are routed automatically.

usps.name: Executive-to-Engineer Traceability
usps.claim: Board goals, risks, workstreams, skills, artifacts, tests, and evidence are connected in one delivery chain.

usps.name: No-Excuses Cutover Pack
usps.claim: Cutover runbook, war room, smoke tests, rollback, decision gates, and hypercare actions are generated and evidence-linked.

usps.name: Migration Intelligence Fabric
usps.claim: Memory, benchmarking, scenarios, war games, value realization, and quality audit become a reusable intelligence layer.

usps.name: Local-First Enterprise Safety
usps.claim: Customer data can stay local while security scan, evidence vault, and generated docs support controlled sharing.

usps.name: Partner Management Assistant
usps.claim: Partner deliverables, open points, responsibilities, and scope risks are challenged with evidence and artifacts.

usps.name: CFO Reconciliation Assurance
usps.claim: Finance migration is controlled through reconciliation, sign-off, audit paths, and value evidence.

usps.name: CISO Evidence Gatekeeper
usps.claim: Security approval is a generated, testable gate across roles, secrets, PCI, privileged access, and evidence.

usps.name: Key User Test Factory
usps.claim: UAT cases, regression packs, process acceptance, smoke tests, and sign-offs are generated for business users.

usps.name: Migration Demo Sales Kit
usps.claim: Manufacturing, Retail/POS, Finance-heavy, CRM/Lead-to-Cash, and multi-country demo projects make the plugin immediately demonstrable.
